Created attachment 254996
Update from 0.107.53 to 0.107.54

Hello,

This patch updates www/adguardhome port to 0.107.54

Full changelog available on official GitHub repo https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome/releases/tag/v0.107.54

It works fine on 14.1-RELEASE amd64.
